blended.narrative: Killington is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 17°F. Expect powder.
